basic_details.job_title: DLSA Karbi Anglong Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority Karbi Anglong
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Karbi Anglong (DLSA Karbi Anglong) has released the official Driver Recruitment 2026 Notification on 16 May 2026 at karbianglongjudiciary.gov.in. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced under the DLSA Karbi Anglong Driver Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged 18 years and above with a Class VIII Pass qualification can apply through offline mode on or before 08 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application form details are available below.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Karbi Anglong Driver Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: karbianglongjudiciary.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
